name: Premier Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Premier Pawn & Jewelry is an EZPAWN-affiliated pawn shop in Lawrenceville, GA offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, pre-owned retail, and auto loans.
description_long:
Premier Pawn & Jewelry is a storefront pawn shop operating at 1455 Pleasant Hill Road in Lawrenceville, Georgia, under the EZPAWN national brand umbrella. As part of the EZPAWN family of stores, it operates within a standardized corporate framework that includes a loyalty rewards program, online inventory, and consistent service protocols across locations. The store serves the Lawrenceville and broader Gwinnett County community with financial services and retail merchandise.

The store's core offering is collateral-based pawn loans: customers bring in items of value, receive a cash loan against them, and can redeem the item by repaying the loan plus fees within the agreed term. Beyond loans, Premier Pawn & Jewelry buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, operates a retail floor stocked with pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers at 25–70% off retail prices. The store also offers auto loans, sells firearms, and provides an online shop with daily new arrivals. Layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and third-party 'Take Today' financing are available for retail purchases.

What distinguishes this location from independent pawn shops is its affiliation with EZPAWN's corporate infrastructure. Customers can enroll in the EZ+ Rewards program to earn points on pawns, redemptions, sales, and purchases, and manage transactions online. The gold-buying service uses professional testing equipment to verify karat and weight, which the company positions as a safeguard for fair pricing. Jewelry purchasers can opt into the Jewelry VIP Program for benefits including guaranteed loan amounts and free stone replacement.

Premier Pawn & Jewelry fills a legitimate niche in short-term, asset-backed lending for consumers who lack access to traditional credit or need cash faster than a bank can provide it. However, pawn loans carry fees and interest rates that are not disclosed on the website — borrowers should review terms carefully in-store. The 'Take Today' payment option relies on third-party lender approval and credit eligibility, so it is not guaranteed. Auto loan terms are also undisclosed online. This is a practical option for fast cash or discounted merchandise, but not a substitute for lower-cost credit products.
address: 1455 Pleasant Hill Rd Unit 901, Lawrenceville, GA 30044

company_info.headquarters: 1455 Pleasant Hill Rd Unit 901, Lawrenceville, GA 30044

pros: Part of EZPAWN national chain with standardized lending process and corporate oversight
EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions
Open 7 days a week including Sundays (12pm–5pm), with weekday hours until 7pm
Online shop with daily new inventory lets customers browse before visiting
Gold and diamond jewelry buying uses professional metal testing for accurate pricing
Pre-owned brand-name merchandise priced 25–70% below retail with layaway available
Layaway requires only 10% down, allowing customers to lock in prices without full upfront payment
cons: Pawn loan fees and interest rates are not disclosed on the website — must be reviewed in-store
'Take Today' flexible payment option depends on third-party lender credit approval, not guaranteed
Auto loan terms and eligibility criteria are not explained anywhere on the store page
All merchandise is pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty unless a separate protection plan is purchased
EZ+ online payment features are unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania (limited national portability)
best_for: Consumers needing fast cash against electronics, jewelry, tools, or other valuables without a credit check
Bargain hunters seeking brand-name electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at significant discounts
Gold and jewelry sellers wanting a buyer with professional testing equipment
Shoppers who need layaway or installment payment options for discretionary purchases
diagnosis: Premier Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for consumers who need immediate cash against an asset they own, or who want heavily discounted pre-owned merchandise with flexible payment options. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees plus interest — are not published online and can be high relative to other short-term credit products; borrowers should compare total repayment cost before committing.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, subject to fees and terms)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Take Today third-party flexible payment financing
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise
